message:
feat(fp-frame): add rolling.agg, to_numpy_2d, dt.to_timestamp

- Rolling::agg(funcs): multi-function rolling aggregation to DataFrame
- DataFrame::to_numpy_2d: extract numeric columns as Vec<Vec<f64>>
- DatetimeAccessor::to_timestamp: convert period strings to datetimes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
